title: Fix text color visibility and add Download as Image (PNG/JPG) feature

requirements.text: Fix text color visibility in the resume preview and form so that all text is clearly legible against its background. Audit all CSS custom properties and inline styles in ResumePreview.tsx, ResumeForm.tsx, and index.css to ensure foreground colors have sufficient contrast against background colors in both light and dark themes.

quotes: the text color are same to the background so change it becoz it shows like invisible text

acceptanceCriteria: All text in the resume preview is clearly visible and readable against its background
All form field labels, inputs, and placeholder text are legible against their backgrounds
No text appears invisible or blends into the background in either light or dark mode

requirements.text: Add a 'Download as Image' button to the resume builder UI (in the sticky header alongside the existing Save as HTML button) that captures the rendered resume preview as a PNG image and triggers a browser download. Use html2canvas or a similar DOM-to-canvas approach to capture the ResumePreview component, then convert the canvas to a PNG blob and download it as 'resume.png'. Profile photos must be included in the captured image.

quotes: dont download as word i need as a photo
Download as Image (PNG/JPG) option that captures the resume as a photo

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Download as Image' button is visible in the header alongside existing action buttons
Clicking the button captures the full resume preview as a PNG image
The captured image includes the profile photo if one is uploaded
The download triggers automatically without opening a new tab

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Keep the existing Save as HTML download option intact — do not remove it
Backend schema and API must not change
nonGoals: Changes to backend data model or resume storage logic
New resume form fields or sections
